shortDescription.default: Modern property management for landlords, managers & tenants
shortDescription.en-US: Modern property management for landlords, managers & tenants

fullDescription.default:
RentFlow is a comprehensive property management solution designed for landlords, property managers, and tenants. Streamline rent collection, maintenance requests, lease management, and financial reporting all in one powerful mobile app.

🏠 FOR LANDLORDS & PROPERTY MANAGERS
• Manage multiple properties from a single dashboard
• Track rent payments and send automated reminders
• Handle maintenance requests efficiently
• Generate financial reports and statements
• Manage leases and tenant information
• Water billing and utility management
• Contractor marketplace for maintenance services

👤 FOR TENANTS
• Pay rent securely via M-Pesa, cards, or bank transfer
• Submit maintenance requests with photos
• View payment history and receipts
• Access lease documents and agreements
• Receive notifications for important updates

🏢 FOR AGENCIES
• Commission-based property management
• Revenue sharing with property owners
• Full tenant management capabilities
• Financial partner integrations for loans

✨ ADDITIONAL FEATURES
• Offline mode for property access without internet
• Biometric authentication for secure login
• Multi-role support (Manager, Landlord, Tenant, Agency)
• Real-time notifications and alerts
• Comprehensive reporting and analytics
• Insurance marketplace integration
• Utility provider connections
• Workflow automation for business processes

Download RentFlow today and transform your property management experience!

contentRating.contentRatingDescription: General audience - suitable for all ages

releaseNotes.default:
Initial release of RentFlow mobile app:

🎉 Complete property management features
👥 Multi-role support for landlords, managers, and tenants
💳 Secure payment processing via M-Pesa
🔧 Maintenance request management
📊 Financial reporting and analytics
📴 Offline mode support
🔐 Biometric authentication
🔔 Real-time notifications
💧 Water billing integration
👷 Contractor marketplace
🛡️ Insurance marketplace
⚡ Utility provider connections
⚙️ Workflow automation

permissions.name: INTERNET
permissions.reason: Required for app functionality and data synchronization

permissions.name: CAMERA
permissions.reason: For taking photos of maintenance requests and documents

permissions.name: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.reason: For property location services and nearby services

permissions.name: POST_NOTIFICATIONS
permissions.reason: For sending push notifications about payments and maintenance
